creator: tangjfn@gmail.com
text:
gcc47 can't be upgraded.

How-To-Repeat: install a new freebsd 9.0, not install any package

portsnap fetch extract

cd /usr/ports/lang/gcc47

make install

it's ok

vi /etc/make.conf
USE_GCC=4.7


cd /usr/ports/pkg_mgmt/portupgrade
make install

it's ok

portupgrade -f gcc47
fail
